executives.name: Ajei Gopal
executives.background: Ajei Gopal is the President and CEO of ANSYS, Inc. and serves as an independent member of the SAP Supervisory Board.

executives.name: Anil Chakravarthy
executives.background: Mr. Chakravarthy has served as President, Digital Experience Business since January 2020. Prior to joining Adobe, he was Chief Executive Officer of Informatica LLC from 2016 to 2020.

executives.name: Glenda Dorchak
executives.background: Former executive at IBM, Intel, and Spansion. She has significant experience in the semiconductor and technology sectors.

executives.name: Robert Calderoni
executives.background: Robert Calderoni was the Executive Chairman of Citrix Systems, Inc. and previously served as Chairman and CEO of Ariba, Inc.
